# HIREXAI

> AI-powered hiring and talent intelligence platform with 27 autonomous AI agents that automate sourcing, screening, interview scheduling, onboarding, compliance, and workforce analytics for employers in India, US, UAE, and UK.

HIREXAI replaces traditional ATS workflows with autonomous AI agents. Employers post a job; agents source from 50+ platforms, screen 10,000+ resumes in 60 seconds, deliver ranked shortlists, schedule interviews, generate offer letters, and run onboarding. Candidates use HIREXAI to discover roles and self-schedule interviews.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and audience switcher (employer vs candidate).
- [For Business](/business): How employers use HIREXAI to source, screen, and hire.
- [For Candidates](/candidate): How candidates find roles and interview with HIREXAI.
- [AI Agents](/agents): The 27 autonomous AI agents and what each one does.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): End-to-end hiring workflow with HIREXAI.
- [Process](/process): Detailed implementation and rollout steps.
- [Customer Stories](/customer-stories): Case studies from companies using HIREXAI.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for India and global markets, including the 14-day free trial.
- [Integrations](/integrations): ATS, HRIS, and job board integrations (Workday, Greenhouse, BambooHR, Naukri, etc.).
- [Demo](/demo): Book a live product demo.
- [Team](/team): The team behind HIREXAI.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI recruitment, HR automation, and hiring strategy.
- [HR FAQ](/hr-faq): Common questions from HR teams and employers.
- [Candidates FAQ](/candidates-faq): Common questions from job seekers.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the HIREXAI team.
